meta.purpose: Structured SEO topic database for industrial IoT product pages, product-solution mapping, internal linking, and future page generation.

field_definitions.title: Human-readable product page or product topic title.
field_definitions.priority: SEO/business priority: P1, P2, or P3.
field_definitions.modifiers: Keyword modifiers such as protocol, connectivity, interface, or application.
field_definitions.protocols: Protocols and communication technologies to mention.
field_definitions.interfaces: Physical or IO interfaces relevant to the product page.
field_definitions.target_solutions: Solution categories or pages to internally link.

topics.title: Industrial RTU
topics.notes: Core commercial pillar for remote telemetry, alarm monitoring, and SCADA data acquisition.

topics.title: MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Core product page for connecting meters, PLCs, inverters, sensors, and equipment to cloud platforms.

topics.title: LoRa Gateway
topics.notes: Core pillar for long-range, low-power sensor connectivity in distributed sites.

topics.title: Remote IO Module
topics.notes: Core pillar for distributed digital and analog signal collection and control.

topics.title: Edge Controller
topics.notes: Core product page for local data processing, protocol conversion, alarms, and automation logic.

topics.title: Industrial IoT Gateway
topics.notes: Umbrella product pillar that should link to MQTT, Modbus, cellular, edge, and application-specific gateway pages.

topics.title: Modbus Gateway
topics.notes: High-intent protocol product page; should link to Modbus RTU Gateway, Modbus TCP Gateway, and Modbus to MQTT Gateway.

topics.title: Cellular IoT Gateway
topics.notes: High-conversion page for remote sites without wired internet.

topics.title: Serial Device Server
topics.notes: Useful supporting product keyword for industrial serial device networking.

topics.title: Protocol Converter
topics.notes: Bridge page for protocol-based SEO and comparison articles.

topics.title: Data Acquisition Gateway
topics.notes: Good page for sensor and meter data collection searches.

topics.title: Industrial Router
topics.notes: Use only if router behavior is a real product feature.

topics.title: IIoT Edge Gateway
topics.notes: Enterprise wording version of industrial IoT gateway and edge controller.

topics.title: Modbus RTU Gateway
topics.notes: Important long-tail product page for RS485 Modbus device connectivity.

topics.title: Modbus TCP Gateway
topics.notes: Should explain Modbus TCP polling, Ethernet devices, and protocol bridging.

topics.title: Modbus to MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: One of the most important SEO conversion pages for IoTEdges.

topics.title: RS485 to MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Close sibling of Modbus to MQTT Gateway; can target engineers searching by physical bus.

topics.title: RS485 Gateway
topics.notes: Strong protocol and interface keyword page.

topics.title: RS232 to Ethernet Gateway
topics.notes: Secondary but useful for legacy equipment networking.

topics.title: OPC UA Gateway
topics.notes: Publish only with accurate feature wording if OPC UA support is confirmed.

topics.title: PLC to MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Good bridge between product and knowledge base content.

topics.title: MQTT Edge Gateway
topics.notes: Commercial wording for MQTT gateway with local edge processing.

topics.title: BACnet Gateway
topics.notes: Candidate only; verify product capability before publishing.

topics.title: CAN Bus Gateway
topics.notes: Candidate only; publish if CAN interface is confirmed.

topics.title: EtherNet/IP Gateway
topics.notes: Candidate only; verify product support before publishing.

topics.title: 4G RTU
topics.notes: High-priority page for remote monitoring where wired internet is unavailable.

topics.title: LTE RTU
topics.notes: Could canonicalize or internally link closely with 4G RTU depending on page strategy.

topics.title: Cellular RTU
topics.notes: Commercial synonym page for 4G RTU and LTE RTU searches.

topics.title: Ethernet RTU
topics.notes: Good fit for local plant, building, and cabinet deployments.

topics.title: WiFi RTU
topics.notes: Publish only if WiFi RTU is a real supported configuration.

topics.title: LoRa RTU
topics.notes: Useful wireless RTU keyword if product line supports LoRa uplink.

topics.title: 4G MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: High-priority product page for cloud-connected remote industrial sites.

topics.title: LTE MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Close synonym page for 4G MQTT Gateway.

topics.title: WiFi MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Publish only if WiFi gateway is a real product option.

topics.title: Ethernet MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Good for factories and buildings with stable LAN connections.

topics.title: LoRa MQTT Gateway
topics.notes: Good bridge between LoRa gateways and cloud platform content.

topics.title: 4G Industrial IoT Gateway
topics.notes: High-priority modifier page for remote industrial IoT deployments.

topics.title: WiFi Industrial IoT Gateway
topics.notes: Candidate for WiFi-enabled gateway product line.

topics.title: Ethernet Industrial Gateway
topics.notes: Good for wired factory and building deployments.

topics.title: 5G Industrial Gateway
topics.notes: Not planned for the first-generation IoTEdges roadmap. Do not publish or include in navigation unless the product strategy changes.

topics.title: LoRaWAN Gateway
topics.notes: High-value LoRa product keyword and should be connected to LoRa knowledge pages.

topics.title: Outdoor LoRa Gateway
topics.notes: Use only when outdoor enclosure and environmental specs are real.

topics.title: Industrial LoRa Gateway
topics.notes: Industrial wording version of LoRa gateway for B2B searches.

topics.title: Digital Input Module
topics.notes: Good engineering keyword for status monitoring and alarms.

topics.title: Digital Output Module
topics.notes: Position around remote control, relay output, and actuator control.

topics.title: Analog Input Module
topics.notes: Important for sensor data acquisition and industrial measurement.

topics.title: Analog Output Module
topics.notes: Useful for control applications if AO hardware is supported.

topics.title: Relay Output Module
topics.notes: Strong practical keyword for remote pump, valve, light, and alarm control.

topics.title: Modbus Remote IO
topics.notes: High-value product page combining protocol and IO category.

topics.title: Ethernet Remote IO
topics.notes: Wired IO page for factories, panels, and buildings.

topics.title: RS485 Remote IO
topics.notes: Strong engineering keyword for distributed cabinet and field IO.

topics.title: Wireless Remote IO
topics.notes: Publish if wireless IO modules or gateway bundles are supported.

topics.title: Remote IO for SCADA
topics.notes: Good bridge page between Remote IO and SCADA-focused solution searches.

topics.title: RTU IO Module
topics.notes: Useful page for RTU plus IO expansion and telemetry modules.

topics.title: RTU for Pump Station Monitoring
topics.notes: High-conversion product-solution page for water infrastructure buyers.

topics.title: MQTT Gateway for Energy Meter Monitoring
topics.notes: One of the first product-solution pages to generate.

topics.title: Modbus Gateway for Solar Inverter Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value solar product page for inverter data acquisition.

topics.title: LoRa Gateway for Agriculture Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong agriculture entry page linking LoRa products and farming solutions.

topics.title: Remote IO for Factory Automation
topics.notes: High-conversion factory automation page.

topics.title: Edge Controller for Machine Monitoring
topics.notes: Important page for OEMs and factories collecting equipment data.

topics.title: 4G Gateway for Remote Equipment Monitoring
topics.notes: A strong commercial page for remote monitoring buyers across industries.

topics.title: RTU for Tank Level Monitoring
topics.notes: High-intent page for water, fuel, chemical, and oil tank monitoring.

topics.title: MQTT Gateway for PLC Data Collection
topics.notes: Good page once PLC protocol support boundaries are clear.

topics.title: LoRa Gateway for Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Good bridge between LoRa gateway and environmental solution clusters.
